tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List jobs, optionally filtered by status (open/closed). Returns the most recent jobs first.
tools.sql: SELECT id, poster_id, poster_name, title, description, location, lat, lng, status, created_at FROM jobs WHERE (:status IS NULL OR status = :status) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT :limit

tools.name: get_job
tools.description: Get a single job by its ID.
tools.sql: SELECT id, poster_id, poster_name, title, description, location, lat, lng, status, created_at FROM jobs WHERE id = :id

tools.name: create_job
tools.description: Create a new cleaning job posting. Requires authentication.
tools.sql: INSERT INTO jobs (id, poster_id, poster_email, poster_name, title, description, location, lat, lng, status, created_at) VALUES (:__uuid, :__user_id, :poster_email, :poster_name, :title, :description, :location, :lat, :lng, 'open', :__now)

tools.name: update_job_status
tools.description: Update the status of a job (e.g. open → closed). Only the poster can do this.
tools.sql: UPDATE jobs SET status = :status WHERE id = :id AND poster_id = :__user_id

tools.name: list_bids
tools.description: List all bids for a given job.
tools.sql: SELECT id, job_id, bidder_id, bidder_name, amount, message, created_at FROM bids WHERE job_id = :job_id ORDER BY amount ASC

tools.name: create_bid
tools.description: Submit a bid on a job. Requires authentication.
tools.sql: INSERT INTO bids (id, job_id, bidder_id, bidder_email, bidder_name, amount, message, created_at) VALUES (:__uuid, :job_id, :__user_id, :bidder_email, :bidder_name, :amount, :message, :__now)

tools.name: list_my_jobs
tools.description: List all jobs posted by the authenticated user.
tools.sql: SELECT id, poster_name, title, description, location, status, created_at FROM jobs WHERE poster_id = :__user_id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT :limit

tools.name: list_my_bids
tools.description: List all bids submitted by the authenticated user.
tools.sql: SELECT id, job_id, amount, message, created_at FROM bids WHERE bidder_id = :__user_id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT :limit
